transcript: Hello everyone, GM GM. So, my name is Rishabh, and I am the founder of encrypt.trade. So we're building a privacy engine for Solana DeFi. We know that 85 million tokens have been launched on Solana last year which makes it the hub for internet capital markets. It's going towards the decentralized Nasdaq, but that cannot be truly achieved unless we have on-chain privacy. There are some solutions trying to do it, but they are either not live, they are slow in performance, or they force the users to leave their current applications and they use uh use this. We are trying to solve that. Introducing encrypt.trade. We allow users to interact with deep liquidity applications like Jupiter, Drift with compliant privacy. We have gone through two layers of audits and provide private execution in under five seconds. We scale along with Solana and not just in theory, I mean in practice as well. Our core innovation is a cryptographic co-processor. We allow on-chain programs to have encrypted states and compute on those encrypted states using zero-knowledge proofs, threshold cryptography, and enclaves. This makes us to horizontally scale across use cases, not just in DeFi as well. We have been already live with Jupiter and here's a small demo as you can see. It's really simple to use. Uh it's seamless UX. You just wrap your assets into encrypted assets and then trade as you are trading on top of Jupiter only. We allow any assets to be traded uh privately. Long tail assets, uh blue chip assets, memes, stocks. You can trade them privately. No one knows who you are buying or selling. We have also added a private send functionality as you can see. Till so far we have done 12 million plus in volume with 4,000 active unique wallet addresses interacting with us. And very I'm very happy to announce that we'll be partnering with NEAR Intents very soon. And to provide other users from other ecosystems to privately onboard their liquidity onto Solana for making it the hub for on-chain finance. Yep. So I've been there in the crypto space for more than four years. Previously was working at Goldman Sachs. And we have been backed by Alliance DAO, have built multiple production-grade cryptographic systems. So here's the QR, just scan it and just use encrypt.trade. Thank you.

# Major Exchange Solana Breach Shakes 2025 Crypto Market
**[MEXC Blog](https://blog.mexc.com/author/shaunt/)**November 27, 2025**[Crypto News & Updates](https://blog.mexc.com/category/news/)
## Overview: Large Solana-Based Withdrawal Detected
On 27 November 2025, a prominent South Korean cryptocurrency exchange detected unauthorized withdrawals of Solana-based assets totaling approximately 54 billion KRW (about $36 million). The irregular outflow included native SOL and a range of tokens from the Solana ecosystem. The exchange immediately suspended Solana network deposits and withdrawals and initiated emergency inspections to contain the incident.
![South Korean exchange flags $36M Solana withdrawals, suspends deposits](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%20210%20140%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)
### Affected assets and scope
* SOL (Solana native token)
* USDC (Solana-based stablecoin)
* Several Solana-native tokens across DeFi and meme markets
* Stolen funds were transferred to external, unidentified wallets
The exchange disclosed wallet addresses linked to the irregular withdrawals as part of its rapid response and forensic efforts. Early analysis indicates the incident was concentrated on assets held on the Solana network, suggesting a vectored compromise rather than a cross-chain exploit.
## Immediate Response and Containment Measures
Following detection, the exchange enacted multiple containment steps:
* Suspension of all Solana network deposits and withdrawals.
* Activation of emergency inspection protocols and forensic investigations.
* Public communication to affected customers with ongoing updates through official channels.
* Disclosure of wallet addresses associated with the outflows to support blockchain tracing efforts.
According to the exchange’s public noti

sources.snippet:
Get Started on Onchain Wallet

[Download Now](https://crypto.com/en/onchain)

[EVENTS](https://crypto.com/en/events) \|2D AGO

# Onchain x LI.FI: Solana Breakpoint Campaign

Win USDC rewards or exclusive Onchain merch

10 - 17 DEC, 2025UTC

To mark Solana Breakpoint 2025, Crypto.com Onchain has partnered with Li.Fi for a special week-long campaign featuring an in-person giveaway and a Solana on-chain trading challenge.

Whether you're attending Breakpoint in Abu Dhabi or participating online, there’s something for everyone! Complete two simple activities to claim exclusive merchandise or trade using Onchain to win from a 2,000 USDC prize pool.

**CAMPAIGN-SPECIFIC TERMS:**

**Campaign Period**

- **Activity 1: Meet & Selfie Challenge:** 10 December 2025, 00:00 UTC to 13 December 2025, 23:59 UTC
- **Activity 2: Solana Trading Challenge:** 10 December 2025, 00:00 UTC to 16 December 2025, 23:59 UTC

**Activity 1. Meet & Selfie (@Breakpoint)**

Join us at the Etihad Arena in Abu Dhabi! Meet the Onchain or Li.Fi team, complete a simple trade, and walk away with exclusive merchandise.

**How to Participate**

_If you wish to participate in the campaign, you may consider completing the following actions:_

- Find an Onchain Wallet or LI.FI team member at Breakpoint,
- Take a selfie with them,
- Post the selfie publicly on X (formerly Twitter),
 - Tag: @onchain\_wallet and @lifiprotocol
 - Include hashtag: #LIFIOnchain
- Download and open the Crypto.com Onchain Wallet, and
- Complete a trade using LI.FI in the Crypto Onchain Wallet app
 - Any chain, any amount, cross-chain or same-chain

**Reward**

- Choose from Onchain-branded swag (“Merch Reward”).
- Available to the first 40 verified and eligible users during the Campaign Period of the Activity 1.
- Merch Reward must be claimed on-site after staff confirmation.
- Limit of one Merch reward per user per day.

**Activity 2: Solana Trading Challenge**

Trade using Onchain Wallet’s LI.FI integration with Solana as part of the route. The top three traders by volume during the campaign will win USDC rewards.

**How to Participate**

_If you wish to participate in the campaign, you may consider completing the following actions:_

- Use Onchain Wallet’s LI.FI-powered swap feature
- Trade involving Solana
 - Examples: ETH to SOL, SOL to USDC, USDC on Solana
- No minimum amount required
- Only trades completed using LI.FI inside the Onchain Wallet will count
- All trades must be performed on Onchain Wallet within the Campaign Period of the Activity 2.

**Rewards**

- **1st Place:** 1,000 USDC
- **2nd Place:** 500 USDC
- **3rd Place:** 250 USDC
- **4th Place:** 150 USDC
- **5th place:** 100 USDC

Winners will be announced within 7 days after the Campaign Period of the Activity 2 ends. Rewards will be sent directly to the eligible wallet addresses on Solana within 7 days after the winner announcement of Activity 2.

**Eligibility and Rules**

- No signup required. Wallet activity and public posts are used to determine eligibility
- All actions must take place within the campaign windows listed above
- Each user is only eligible for one reward per track per day
- Suspicious activity such as wash trading or duplicate wallets will lead to disqualification
- In case of a tie in trading volume, the user who reached that volume first will win
- Onchain Wallet staff will verify on-site winners by checking trade history and social media posts
- All rewards are subject to verification and may be withheld if conditions are not met

### **Important Information**

- The Crypto.com Onchain Wallet is a standalone, non-custodial product and is not part of the regulated Crypto.com App or Exchange ecosystem.
- The Solana Breakpoint Campaign (“ **Campaign**”) is organised by Crypto.com Onchain Wallet and LI.FI, and is [available in select jurisdictions only](https://help.crypto.com/en/articles/4429907-crypto-com-onchain-wallet-swap-geo-restrictions). Participation is optional and subject to eligibility requirem

tags.impact_reason: Encrypt.trade introduces a privacy layer on Solana, which is a valuable feature, but its current usage and impact are still relatively limited.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a 'Cryptographic Co-processor' as the Semantic Anchor because the transcript highlights it as the 'core innovation'. This physical, high-tech object perfectly represents the concepts of secure enclaves, encrypted states, and a specialized 'privacy engine' for Solana. For the homepage text, I integrated '<5s' as a holographic data projection from the co-processor. This diegetically showcases the sub-5-second execution speed, a critical performance metric mentioned in the standfirst for institutional DeFi.
visual_idea.description: A macro shot focusing on the central crystalline core of the cryptographic co-processor. We see the microscopic details of the bioluminescent circuits weaving through the translucent crystal layers. The light within pulses with energy, refracting through the geometric facets of the crystal, suggesting intense, encrypted computation happening within. The surrounding anodized titanium casing frames the shot.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro shot focusing on the central crystalline core of the cryptographic co-processor. We see the microscopic details of the bioluminescent circuits weaving through the translucent crystal layers. The light within pulses with energy, refracting through the geometric facets of the crystal, suggesting intense, encrypted computation happening within. The surrounding anodized titanium casing frames the shot. The bioluminescent circuits emit a vibrant cyan glow, augmented by a warm internal glow that pulses with magenta and teal plasma, creating dynamic highlights and deep shadows within the crystalline data structures. A focused beam of light, reminiscent of a diagonal spotlight, illuminates the core, enhancing the crystalline refraction and translucence. The anodized titanium casing exhibits a meticulously detailed, subtly reflective texture. Composed for a 1:1 square aspect ratio, emphasizing perfect symmetry and a central focus with tight macro framing. The entire frame is filled with intricate textures and details, showcasing the microscopic complexity. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, cinematic contrast, ultra-detailed.

editorial.headline: Encifher Unveils 'encrypt.trade' to Bring Institutional Privacy to Solana DeFi
editorial.standfirst: Former Goldman Sachs strategist launches privacy engine capable of sub-5-second execution, solving the 'dark pool' dilemma for Solana's capital markets.
key_takeaways: Sub-5 Second Settlement: New cryptographic co-processor reduces FHE latency, enabling seamless integration with Jupiter.
NEAR Intents Partnership: Upcoming integration to facilitate private, cross-chain liquidity onboarding.
$12M Volume Milestone: Privacy protocol already live with 4,000 unique wallets trading blue-chip and long-tail assets.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
If Solana is to become the "Decentralized Nasdaq"—a core theme of Breakpoint 2025—it faces a critical hurdle: transparency. Institutional capital cannot flow freely on a ledger where every entry and exit is visible to predatory high-frequency traders. **Encifher** aims to close this gap with the launch of **encrypt.trade**, a privacy engine designed to bring compliant, dark-pool-style execution to Solana’s high-velocity DeFi ecosystem.

Founded by **Rishabh Gupta**, a former Goldman Sachs analyst, the protocol addresses the historical trade-off between privacy and speed. While traditional Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) solutions have struggled with latency, Encifher’s new cryptographic co-processor utilizes Zero-Knowledge proofs and threshold cryptography to achieve private execution in under five seconds. This performance leap allows the protocol to integrate directly with deep liquidity venues like **Jupiter** and **Drift** without forcing users to leave their preferred interfaces or suffer significant slippage.

Adoption is already underway, with the protocol reporting over $12 million in volume across 4,000 unique wallets. The system enables users to wrap assets—from blue chips to long-tail memecoins—into encrypted states, rendering trading strategies invisible on-chain. Crucially, the architecture is built for horizontal scaling, positioning it to handle the throughput required by the 85 million tokens launched on Solana in the past year.

Looking ahead, Encifher is expanding its scope beyond the Solana native ecosystem. Gupta announced a strategic partnership with **NEAR Intents**, which will allow liquidity from other chains to onboard privately onto Solana. Backed by **Alliance DAO**, the project represents a shift from experimental privacy tools to production-grade infrastructure essential for the next wave of institutional adoption.
